name: EdwBhiMbrCobStep2Ds

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH Step1 AS (SELECT A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, A.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, A.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, A.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, A.MID_EFF_DT_SK, A.MID_TERM_DT_SK, A.END_EFF_DT_SK, A.END_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B WHERE A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.BEG_EFF_DT_SK = B.MID_EFF_DT_SK), Step2 AS (SELECT Step1.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, Step1.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, Step1.MBR_TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, Step1.MBR_COB_TYP_CD AS MBR_COB_TYP_CD, Step1.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, Step1.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, 'NULL' AS BEG_EFF_DT_SK, 'NULL' AS BEG_TERM_DT_SK, Step1.MID_EFF_DT_SK AS MID_EFF_DT_SK, Step1.MID_TERM_DT_SK AS MID_TERM_DT_SK, Step1.END_EFF_DT_SK AS END_EFF_DT_SK, Step1.END_TERM_DT_SK AS END_TERM_DT_SK, NULL AS UPDT_IN FROM Step1) SELECT * FROM Step2
